title: Welcome to JumpStart
message: Manage, launch, and monitor every project on your PC from one place. Explore the sidebar to get started.

title: One-click updates are here
message: JumpStart can now update itself in place. Open Preferences and hit Check for Updates to grab the latest release.

title: Enjoying JumpStart?
message: If it's saving you time, a star on GitHub helps others find the project. Thanks for the support!
